  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The section makes interdependent technical claims about the SP-PINN loss formulation, the meta-gradient update over B, and the gradient-balancing scheme; internal consistency across these components is a plausible load-bearing task.",
    "R1.3": "Six specific citations are attached to mechanistic claims (spectral bias, gradient imbalance, Fourier-feature remediation, residual-adaptive sampling); verifying that each citation actually supports its attached claim is central given the artifact.",
    "R1.5": "The section interleaves method description (paragraphs 1–2), a related-work block (paragraph 3), and a training-procedure paragraph (paragraph 4) without a clear organizing principle; narrative reordering is a plausible focus.",
    "R1.6": "The delegation 'help me with this section' most commonly signals prose-level improvement; sentence clarity, consistency of notation, and paragraph cohesion are all plausible primary tasks.",
    "R1.7": "Six distinct inline citations appear; reference accuracy, appropriate attribution of priority claims, and coverage of omitted related work are directly implicated by the artifact's density of scholarship."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Are you primarily looking for writing and clarity improvements (grammar, flow, notational consistency), or for a technical and scholarly review (logical consistency of the method, claim-to-citation alignment, reference accuracy)?"
}

rationale.R1.2: The section makes interdependent technical claims about the SP-PINN loss formulation, the meta-gradient update over B, and the gradient-balancing scheme; internal consistency across these components is a plausible load-bearing task.
rationale.R1.3: Six specific citations are attached to mechanistic claims (spectral bias, gradient imbalance, Fourier-feature remediation, residual-adaptive sampling); verifying that each citation actually supports its attached claim is central given the artifact.
rationale.R1.5: The section interleaves method description (paragraphs 1–2), a related-work block (paragraph 3), and a training-procedure paragraph (paragraph 4) without a clear organizing principle; narrative reordering is a plausible focus.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'help me with this section' most commonly signals prose-level improvement; sentence clarity, consistency of notation, and paragraph cohesion are all plausible primary tasks.
rationale.R1.7: Six distinct inline citations appear; reference accuracy, appropriate attribution of priority claims, and coverage of omitted related work are directly implicated by the artifact's density of scholarship.
